deck.description: Full deck object. Shape: { title: string, themeId: ThemeId, slides: Slide[],

activeSlide.description: Currently selected slide. Shape: { id, layout, title, body, imageUrl, notes, fontSize? }.

theme.description: Current theme ID. Valid values: "classic-light" (white bg, blue accent),

aspectRatio.description: Slide aspect ratio as "W:H" string (e.g. "16:9", "4:3", "1:1" or custom like "3:2").

activeIndex.description: Zero-based index of the currently active (selected) slide.

slideCount.description: Total number of slides in the deck.

fontSize.description: Global text scale for all slides. Values: "sm" (0.78x), "md" (1.0x, default),

setDeck.description: Replace the entire deck at once. All fields are normalized on write.

appendSlides.description: Append one or more slides to the end of the deck and select the last appended slide.

setActiveIndex.description: Select a slide by zero-based index. Clamped to valid range. Returns { ok, activeIndex }.

setTheme.description: Change the deck theme. Valid themeId values: "classic-light", "midnight-dark", "ocean", "sunset".

setAspectRatio.description: Set slide aspect ratio. Pass a "W:H" string.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio string, e.g. "16:9", "4:3", "1:1", or custom "W:H".

setFontSize.description: Set global font size scale for all slides.

saveToStorage.description: Save current deck JSON to YAAR storage at the given path. Returns { ok, path, slideCount }.

loadFromStorage.description: Load one or many deck JSON files from YAAR storage and merge into the current deck.

readStorageFile.description: Read a single file from YAAR storage and return its content. Returns { ok, path, as, content }.

readStorageFiles.description: Read multiple files from YAAR storage. Returns { ok, as, files: [{ path, content }] }.
